notes: Moves seasonal theme settings to a top-level Theme tab beside Home and About & Privacy.
Removes the ineffective manual Sync with Streamlit appearance workflow from Pathmark Online settings.
Changes Pathmark styling to follow Streamlit theme CSS variables directly, so Streamlit Light/Dark/System remains the single appearance control.
Clears legacy Pathmark light/dark attributes that could force the page to stay light after Streamlit Dark was selected.
Keeps Summer, Autumn, Winter and Spring as seasonal accent choices only.
release: v0.6.43 Theme tab and Streamlit CSS variable repair
release_name: Theme tab and Streamlit CSS variable repair
release_notes: Moves seasonal theme settings to a top-level Theme tab and makes Pathmark follow Streamlit theme CSS variables directly for light/dark appearance.
label: Theme tab and Streamlit CSS variable repair
